fields.name: customerName
fields.whyRequired: Identifies the accountable customer entity that accepts the pilot outcome.
fields.validationCommand: Confirm the customer name on the signed acceptance document matches the contract / SOW.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Customer name on the signed acceptance record matches the engagement contract.

fields.name: acceptanceCriteriaRefs
fields.realProvider: Joint customer + delivery acceptance test plan
fields.whyRequired: Sign-off must reference the specific acceptance criteria that were demonstrated and passed.
fields.validationCommand: Cross-reference each AC id against the executed acceptance test report and its pass result.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Every referenced acceptance criterion has a recorded PASS in the acceptance test report.

fields.name: signoffDate
fields.whyRequired: Establishes the effective date of pilot acceptance for contractual and audit purposes.
fields.validationCommand: Confirm the date on the signed document is on or after the last acceptance test execution date.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Sign-off date is present, valid, and not back-dated before testing completed.

fields.name: signer
fields.exampleValue: Placeholder Signer Name, Placeholder Title (e.g., Head of Middleware), Example Bank Placeholder
fields.whyRequired: Acceptance must be signed by a person with authority to accept on the customer's behalf.
fields.validationCommand: Verify the signer's authority against the customer's delegation-of-authority matrix.
fields.expectedSuccessfulOutput: Signer holds documented authority to accept; signature is present and verifiable.
